headlines: Stablecoin market tops $315B as USDC gains ground
Ethereum Foundation nears 70,000 ETH staking goal after $93M deposit
Coinbase wins conditional OCC trust charter — US banks push back
CLARITY Act stablecoin reward talks see fresh momentum, Coinbase says deal near

FTX Recovery Trust begins $2.2B creditor distribution (late March) — market impact possible','Google Quantum AI paper: future quantum attacks could threaten BTC/ETH keys','Spot Bitcoin ETFs show small net inflows as ETF flows diverge','Tether fundraising push given deadline as issuer eyes large valuation

articles.title: Stablecoin market tops $315 billion as USDC gains ground
articles.summary: Stablecoin supply hit roughly $315 billion in Q1 2026, and Circle’s USDC has been growing market share as some traders and institutions favor regulated, transparent issuers over Tether. This shift is changing on‑chain flows and liquidity across exchanges.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation nears 70,000 ETH staking goal after $93M deposit
articles.summary: The Ethereum Foundation deposited about 45,034 ETH (≈$93M) to the Beacon Deposit Contract, bringing its total staked ETH close to the 70,000‑ETH Treasury Staking Initiative target. The move signals the Foundation is shifting more treasury ETH from sales to yield generation and network security.

articles.title: Coinbase wins conditional OCC trust charter; community banks object
articles.summary: Regulators gave Coinbase conditional approval to form a federally chartered national trust company, a major step for U.S. crypto custody and institutional services. Independent community banking groups say the move raises consumer‑protection and competition concerns and are pushing back.

articles.title: CLARITY Act stablecoin reward talks pick up — Coinbase says deal is close
articles.summary: Lawmakers and industry negotiators are edging toward agreement on the CLARITY Act’s stablecoin reward rules. Coinbase’s legal chief said a deal on the rewards language could come within days, a development that would affect how exchanges and banks can offer yields on stablecoins.

articles.title: FTX Recovery Trust starts $2.2 billion creditor distribution — market liquidity watch
articles.summary: The FTX Recovery Trust initiated a roughly $2.2 billion distribution to eligible creditors at the end of March. Analysts warn a portion of those funds could re‑enter crypto markets, temporarily adding selling pressure or raising exchange liquidity.

articles.title: Google Quantum AI paper warns quantum attacks could crack BTC/ETH keys faster than thought
articles.summary: Google’s Quantum AI team published research suggesting a future quantum computer could derive private keys from public keys in minutes, shortening the timeline for when some on‑chain wallets may be vulnerable. The paper urges the crypto industry to accelerate post‑quantum upgrades and defensive steps.
articles.source: KuCoin / PC Gamer (coverage of Google paper)

articles.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs post small net inflows as flows and token demand diverge
articles.summary: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded modest net inflows on April 4, while flows across other crypto ETFs (including some Ether products) showed a mixed picture — a sign of cautious but continued institutional interest that can still move prices short term.

articles.title: Tether sets deadline for large fundraising effort as issuer eyes big valuation
articles.summary: Tether is pressing forward with a private fundraising effort and set a short deadline for investor commitments as it explores growth across stablecoins, payments, and new business lines. The fundraising outcome would shape Tether’s capital plans and market positioning versus regulated rivals.
